title: Cursed Protocol Support
description: Unoffical fork of ProtocolSupport 1.8.8 with Mappings fixes and old April Fools versions support
body:
## This is an Unoffical fork of ProtocolSupport 1.8.8 with Mappings fixes and old April Fools versions support

**You must add below in ViaVersion jar's plugin.yml to make this working with ViaVersion 5+.**
```
softdepend: [ ProtocolSupport ]
``` 

This fork of ProtocolSupport 1.8.8 supports all 1.7.10-1.4.X (stable to 1.4.7/6, experimental to 1.4.5-1.4.4, 1.4.3, 1.4.2-1.4.0) and 15w14a, 2.0 April Fools versions, with more mappings fixes to fix 1.4.6-1.6.4 crashes.

Please use **TacoSpigot & Forks** instead of paper to avoid problem with 1.7.X clients.

Known issues:
* [15w14a] Carrot on a stick crashes client
* [1.7/1.7.1] Random kick
* [1.6.4 and earlier] Stats are not sent - won't be fixed
* [1.5.2 and earlier] Can't control vehicle - won't be fixed, probably impossible to do this properly
* [1.4.7 and earlier] Online mode likely unable to connect
* [1.4.5 and earlier] Dropped items didn't show + randomly disconnect + Item Frames with item crashes client
* [1.4.3 and earlier] Nether chunks corruptions

================

If you want to improve this cursed stuff more, Please contact on Github https://github.com/HowardZHY/ProtocolSupport

================
